blocks.content: Create Executables from a Pipeline whenever possible. A Pipeline keeps related Executables together and controls their execution order. You can also create certain Executables from a Direction or Connection. This page focuses on the recommended Pipeline creation path.
Open the Pipeline that will contain the Executable, then select one of the create options:

children.alt: New Direction Executable dialog opened from a Pipeline
New Source Query dialog opened from a Pipeline
New Target Action dialog opened from a Pipeline
